hero.title: Powerful Features for
hero.subtitle: Every Role
hero.description: CareNet serves every participant in the care journey with role-specific tools designed to make life easier.

guardians.title: For Guardians
guardians.subtitle: Everything you need to manage care for your loved ones

f1.title: Post Care Requirements
f1.description: Describe exactly what care your loved one needs and receive tailored proposals

f2.title: Browse Verified Agencies
f2.description: Review licensed agencies in your area and compare ratings

f3.title: Bid Review & Placement
f3.description: Compare agency proposals side-by-side with escrow protection

f4.title: Real-Time Shift Monitoring
f4.description: See caregiver check-ins, care logs, and vital updates as they happen

f5.title: Secure Payments
f5.description: Pay through bKash, Nagad, Rocket, or credit card with escrow protection

f6.title: Patient Care Dashboard
f6.description: Track all patients, active placements, and care history

f7.title: Care Requirements Wizard
f7.description: Step-by-step guidance to post comprehensive care requirements

f8.title: Family Hub
f8.description: Coordinate care among family members with shared access

caregivers.title: For Caregivers
caregivers.subtitle: Tools to build your career in caregiving

f1.title: Job Marketplace
f1.description: Browse care jobs posted by agencies across Bangladesh

f2.title: Digital Care Logging
f2.description: Record vital signs, medications, and tasks for every shift

f3.title: Earnings & Payouts
f3.description: Track daily and monthly earnings in real-time

f4.title: Portfolio & Reviews
f4.description: Build a verified work history and collect guardian reviews

f5.title: Training Portal
f5.description: Access skill assessments and professional development

f6.title: Shift Planner
f6.description: Manage your schedule and view upcoming shifts

f7.title: Skills Assessment
f7.description: Complete competency assessments and display verified skills

f1.title: Requirements Inbox
f1.description: Receive care requirement submissions directly from guardians

f2.title: Job Management
f2.description: Post jobs and manage the entire placement lifecycle

f3.title: Shift Monitoring
f3.description: Live dashboard showing caregiver check-ins across all clients

f4.title: Caregiver Roster
f4.description: Manage your entire caregiver workforce from one dashboard

f6.title: Agency Analytics
f6.description: Track revenue trends and placement success rates

f7.title: Staff Hiring
f7.description: Post job openings and streamline your hiring pipeline

f8.title: Backup Caregiver
f8.description: Assign backup caregivers for critical cases

f9.title: Incidents Management
f9.description: Log and track care incidents with compliance

f1.title: Vitals Tracking
f1.description: Log blood pressure, pulse rate, glucose, and temperature

f2.title: Medication Reminders
f2.description: Receive scheduled reminders for every medication

f3.title: Emergency Hub
f3.description: One-tap access to emergency contacts and nearby hospitals

f4.title: Health Reports
f4.description: View comprehensive health summaries and download records

f5.title: Care History
f5.description: Full timeline of all care received with complete transparency

f6.title: Data Privacy Controls
f6.description: Control exactly who can view your health information

f7.title: Patient Schedule
f7.description: View upcoming caregiver shifts and appointments

f1.title: Product Listings
f1.description: List medical equipment, mobility aids, and healthcare products

f2.title: Order Management
f2.description: Track orders from placement to fulfillment

f3.title: Revenue Analytics
f3.description: Monitor sales trends and identify top-performing products

f4.title: Inventory Tracking
f4.description: Set stock levels and receive low-inventory alerts

f5.title: Customer Orders
f5.description: View and manage all customer orders efficiently

f7.title: Merchant Onboarding
f7.description: Simple onboarding process to get your shop live

f8.title: Fulfillment Management
f8.description: Track order fulfillment and manage shipping

platform.title: Features for
platform.subtitle: Everyone
platform.description: Powerful capabilities built into every part of the CareNet platform

f1.title: Works Offline
f1.description: Care logs save locally and sync automatically

f2.title: Bilingual Support
f2.description: Full English and Bangla language support

f3.title: Mobile Native
f3.description: Installable as PWA or native Android/iOS app

f4.title: Real-Time Updates
f4.description: Live care feeds and instant notifications

f6.title: 24/7 Support
f6.description: Round-the-clock support via phone and WhatsApp
